items.name: Momo
items.description: Choice of Chicken or Vegetable dumplings served with homemade tomato sauce. Vegan option available.

items.name: Tareko Machha
items.description: Fish pieces marinated in traditional Nepalese herbs. Served with mint-yoghurt sauce. Dairy Free option available.

items.name: Prawn Tempura
items.description: Prawns marinated in a lightly spiced batter. Served with mint-yoghurt sauce. Dairy Free option available.

items.name: Samosa
items.description: Homemade lightly spiced vegetables filled in a triangle pastry. Served with a mint-yoghurt sauce. Vegan option available.

items.name: Sekewa
items.description: Tender pieces of chicken fillet marinated in roasted cumin and szechwan. Served with mint-yoghurt sauce.

items.name: Phulaura
items.description: Traditional crispy patties prepared from black lentils and mixed vegetables. Served with a mint-yoghurt sauce. Vegan option available.

items.name: Mismaas (Mixed Entrée)
items.description: An assortment with one of each of the above entrees.

items.name: Haku Choila
items.description: Typical Newari cuisine from Kathmandu, offering flavoursome boneless lamb with a side of crispy rice and tomato achar.

items.name: Roti Dip Platter
items.description: Freshly baked herbed bread served with an assortment of complementing dips.

items.name: Badami Sekewa (Almond Chicken)
items.description: Tender juicy pieces of chicken fillet lightly marinated in a creamy yoghurt sauce. Served with fresh salad & mint-yoghurt sauce.

items.name: Sekewa Main
items.description: Tender pieces of chicken fillet marinated in roasted cumin and szechwan. Served with mint-yoghurt sauce.

items.name: Poleko Khasi (Lamb Ribs)
items.description: Our signature juicy lamb ribs served with stir fried potatoes and fresh salad.

items.name: Chulo ko Machha
items.description: Tender pieces of Barramundi fillet lightly marinated in yoghurt and lemon juice. Served with fresh salad and mint-yoghurt sauce.

items.name: Nepali Chulo Platter
items.description: An assortment of our finest clay oven dishes. Served with sautéed mushrooms, fresh salad and mint-yoghurt sauce.

items.name: Khasiko Masu (Goat or Lamb Curry)
items.description: Traditionally spiced slow cooked curry with your choice of tender boneless lamb or goat enriched with cinnamon and bay leaves.

items.name: Sekewa Ko Leddoor (Butter Chicken)
items.description: Juicy chicken fillets from the clay oven simmered in a creamy tomato sauce, enriched with fenugreek and almond powder.

items.name: Kukhura ko Masu (Mild Chicken Curry)
items.description: Traditional country style chicken curry prepared in aromatic spices, enriched with ground almonds.

items.name: Bhuteko Masu
items.description: Dry roasted lamb full of strong authentic flavours marinated in our chef's own special recipe.

items.name: Piro Kukhura (Chilli Chicken)
items.description: Lightly battered chicken cubes pan-fried in a sweet and spicy tangy sauce with capsicum and onion. Gluten free option available.

items.name: Piro Dehrai Tarkari (Hot Vindaloo Curry)
items.description: A hot favourite for the spice lovers. Your choice of meat (Goat/Chicken/Lamb) infused with a special homemade spicy onion and tomato paste.

items.name: Machha Tarkari (Fish Curry)
items.description: Aromatic barramundi curry delicately cooked in a creamy onion, tomato and coconut milk sauce.

items.name: Piro Jhingey (Chilli Prawn)
items.description: Prawns pan-fried with capsicum and onion, flavoured with a tangy chilli sauce. Gluten Free option available.

items.name: Jhingey ko Tarkari (Prawn Curry)
items.description: Rich prawn curry cooked with capsicum in a creamy onion, tomato and coconut milk sauce.

items.name: Chaw ko Tarkari
items.description: Diced button mushrooms with capsicum, tomato and onion in a homemade masala flavoured with fenugreek and traditional spices.

items.name: Paneer Ko Tarkari
items.description: A rich dish of cottage cheese with capsicum and onion in a tomato based sauce, enriched with traditional spices and a dash of cream.

items.name: Palak Paneer
items.description: Cottage cheese in a lightly spiced sauce folded through pureed spinach. Vegan option available.

items.name: Misayako Tarkari
items.description: Seasonal vegetables tossed in a pan with traditional herbs and spices.

items.name: Kwati
items.description: Traditional Newari dish of nine different sprouted beans cooked in a tomato and onion base.

items.name: Buteko Bhanta
items.description: Sweet ripe eggplant stir fried with onion, potato and capsicum enriched with ground mustard and fennel seeds.

items.name: Pharsi ko Tarkari
items.description: Smashed pumpkin flavoured with mustard seeds and fenugreek.

items.name: Rayoko Saag
items.description: Our signature stir-fried mustard leaves flavoured with garlic, chilli and mustard seeds. Vegan option available.

items.name: Jhaneko Daal
items.description: Yellow and black lentils cooked in traditional style with authentic herbs.

items.name: Buteko Arloo
items.description: Stir fried potatoes flavoured with fennel, fenugreek, cumin and mustard seed.

items.name: Hariyo Salad
items.description: Fresh garden salad prepared from tomatoes, lettuce, cucumber, carrot and capsicum, enriched with special homemade dressing.

items.name: Golbhedako Achar
items.description: Roasted tomato and garlic relish flavoured with coriander.

items.name: Sweet Mango Chutney
items.description: Sweet and tangy mango pickle.

items.name: Dahima (Nepalese Raita)
items.description: Refreshing yoghurt flavoured with roasted cumin, sugar and cucumber.

items.name: Bhuteko Bhaat
items.description: Fried rice infused with peas, cashew nuts, raisins, green beans, carrot & red onion. Vegan and Nut Free option available.

items.name: Bhaat
items.description: Fresh steamed Basmati rice.

items.name: Pappadams
items.description: Served with mint-yoghurt sauce. Vegan option available.

items.name: Roti
items.description: Freshly baked leavened bread cooked in the clay oven.

items.name: Roti Lasun
items.description: Freshly baked garlic bread cooked in the clay oven.

items.name: Roti Cheese
items.description: Freshly baked bread from the clay oven stuffed with premium cheese.

items.name: Roti Keema
items.description: Freshly baked bread from the clay oven stuffed with lean lamb mince.

items.name: Namaste Ice cream
items.description: Chef's special homemade ice cream made from pistachio nuts and flavoured with mango & cardamom.

items.name: Bailey's Ice cream
items.description: Rich Bailey's ice cream with crushed chocolate almonds throughout. Topped with a shot of Bailey's Irish Cream.

items.name: Strawberry Ice cream
items.description: Deliciously smooth strawberry ice cream topped with a shot of Cointreau.

items.name: Laal Mohaan
items.description: Honey balls prepared from milk powder flavoured with cardamom, rose water and topped with grated coconut.

items.name: Vanilla Bean Ice cream
items.description: Creamy vanilla bean ice cream.

items.name: Vanilla Coconut Ice cream
items.description: Smooth vanilla ice cream with a hint of coconut flavour.

items.name: Affogato
items.description: Vanilla bean ice cream served with a shot of espresso coffee. Add a liqueur of your choice (Bailey's, Frangelico, Kahlua, Tia Maria).
